summary: Comprehensive testing of Cafe Empire app completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (27/27 tests passed). Frontend 85% functional - login, home, search, cart, orders, profile all working correctly. Critical issue: Product detail page renders as black screen despite elements being present in DOM.

ui_bugs.issue: Page renders as completely black screen. Back button and form elements (size, sugar, addons) exist in DOM with correct testIDs but are not visually rendered. Likely styling issue with hero image background color or z-index layering problem.

issues: 520 error when loading logo image (non-blocking but should be investigated)
'Our Menu' section shows dark/black placeholder image in some product cards

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' - these are warnings only, not breaking functionality

action_items: Fix product detail page rendering issue - check hero image styling, SafeAreaView implementation, and z-index layering in /app/frontend/app/product/[id].tsx
Investigate 520 error on logo/static assets - may be CDN or image host issue
Add testID attributes to Profile screen logout button for easier testing
Consider fixing deprecation warnings for pointerEvents and shadow props (low priority)
critical_code_review_comments: Product detail page has structural issue - elements render in DOM but not visible on screen, suggests CSS/styling problem with container or image overlay
Backend code quality is excellent - proper async/await, Pydantic validation, MongoDB _id exclusion, JWT auth implementation
Frontend auth flow well implemented with AsyncStorage token management
All API endpoints properly prefixed with /api and use environment variables correctly
Mobile-first design implemented correctly with proper spacing, touch targets, and tab navigation

success_rate.frontend: 85% (6/7 major screens working, 1 critical rendering issue)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing demo user (demo@cafeempire.com/demo123) and products seeded by backend startup. Backend tests create test users with TEST_ prefix for isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product detail page black screen issue needs to be fixed by main agent before retesting. All other flows are working. Test files are reusable for regression testing. Payment flow is MOCKED (ABA PayWay auto-confirms).

auth.login: ✅ Working - returns token and user data
auth.register: ✅ Working - creates user and returns token

categories.get_all: ✅ Working - returns all 4 categories (Hot Coffee, Iced Coffee, Tea & More, Desserts)

products.get_by_id: ✅ Working - returns product details with sizes, addons, sugar levels

cart.get: ✅ Working - returns cart with enriched product data
cart.add: ✅ Working - adds items and calculates prices correctly

orders.create: ✅ Working - creates order from cart and clears cart

payment.initiate: ✅ Working - returns mock QR code and payment ID
payment.confirm: ✅ Working - updates payment and order status (MOCKED)

tracking.get: ✅ Working - returns order tracking data with steps and driver info

frontend_screens.login: ✅ Fully working - logo, inputs, buttons, demo hint all visible and functional
frontend_screens.home: ✅ Fully working - greeting, search, categories, product grid with images and prices
frontend_screens.product_detail: ❌ BROKEN - renders as black screen, elements exist but not visible
frontend_screens.cart: ✅ Fully working - shows empty state correctly
frontend_screens.orders: ✅ Fully working - shows order history with status badges
frontend_screens.profile: ✅ Fully working - shows user info and menu options
frontend_screens.search: ✅ Working - filters products by search term

mocked_integrations.aba_payway: Payment initiation returns mock QR code data. Confirmation auto-succeeds without real payment gateway interaction.
